rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PAUL SAM TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 5, 2019, AS RESTATED on March 18, 2021
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Personal Appearance And Production Of Documents Pursuant To Objector Jennifer Sam?S Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Production Of Documents And Things To Ying ?Jenny? He; Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: (1 of 1) This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the court is Objector Jennifer Sam's Motion To Compel Personal Appearance And Production Of Documents Pursuant To Objector Jennifer Sam's Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Production Of Documents And Things To Ying "Jenny" He; Request For Monetary Sanctions. The motion is DENIED as procedurally defective. There is no showing it has been properly served on the non-party deponent, Ying "Jenny" He. Petitioner shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling as published above. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PAUL SAM TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 5, 2019, AS RESTATED on March 18, 2021
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition And Production Of Documents To Amended Objector Jennifer Sam?S Notice Of Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents To Petitioner Diana Sam; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: (1 of 1) This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the court is Objector Jennifer Sam's Motion To Compel Deposition And Production Of Documents To Amended Objector Jennifer Sam's Notice Of Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents To Petitioner Diana Sam; Request For Sanctions. Appearance Required.
